subparts.text: Why is thermal conductivity of metallic solids much higher than that of nonmetallic solids? Give proper reason.
Write the General conduction equation in cylindrical coordinates along with diagram and give the significance of each term appearing in the equation.

Define effectiveness of a fin and write the expression for the effectiveness of an infinitely long fin of uniform cross-section in terms of its perimeter P, thermal conductivity k, heat transfer coefficient h and area of cross-section Ac .
State BuckinghamвҖҷs пҒ° theorem for dimensional analysis.
Define Grashof Number and write its expression. Give the units and significance of each term appearing in the expression.
Draw the boiling curve for water and mark different regimes of boiling on it.
Draw the temperature variations of hot and cold fluids along the lengths of a condenser and an evaporator.
Differentiate between Gray Body and Selective Emitter.

questions.question_text: Derive the expression for the heat loss rate by conduction from a hollow sphere heated from within in terms of inside temperature t1, outside temperature t2 inside radius r1, outside radius r2 and thermal conductivity k.

A furnace wall is made up of three layers of thicknesses 300 mm, 125 mm and 175 mm with thermal conductivities of 1.65, k and 9.2 W/m-K respectively. The inside is exposed to gases at 1300oC with a convection coefficient of 25 W/m2-K and the inside surface temperature is 1300oC. The outside surface is exposed to air at 25oC with convective coefficient of 12 W/m2-K. Determine the unknown thermal conductivity k and the overall heat transfer coefficient.
Derive the generalised governing differential equation for fins in the following form: 0 1 2 2 пҖҪ пҖӯ пҖ« пҒұ пҒұ пҒұ c c c kA hP dx d dx dA A dx d The symbols have their usual meanings.

A square metal plate of 0.8 m2 area and 3 mm thickness is heated uniformly to a temperature of 90oC. It is then cooled by air at 20oC that flows at 2 m/s over both sides parallel to the plate. Neglecting temperature gradient in the plate, calculate the heat loss from both sides of the plate. For the plate material, пҒІ= 2500 kg/m3 and Cp = 0.65 kJ/kg-K. Thermophysical properties of air at 55oC are: пҒІ= 1.076 kg/m3 and Cp = 1008 J/kg-K, k = 0.0286 W/m-K and Вө = 19.8 Г— 10-6 N-s/m2. Assume missing data, if any
Using BuckinghamвҖҷs пҒ°theorem show that the data for free convection may be correlated by; Pr) ,

Water enters a counter flow double pipe heat exchanger at 20oC and leaves at 80oC with a flow rate of 0.42 kg/s. The water is to cool alcohol from 110oC to 30oC. The convective coefficient between the alcohol and the tube wall is 2250 W/m2-K and that between the tube wall and water is 5650 W/m2-K. Presuming tube wall to be thin, make calculation for the heat transfer area required. Use the effectiveness-NTU method only.
Find the shape factors F11, F12, F22 and F21 for a black solid sphere 2 of diameter 7 cm inside a hollow black sphere 1 of diameter 15 cm as shown below.
A black body of 1500 cm2 area has an effective temperature of 527oC. Calculate: The total rate of energy emission The wavelength of maximum monochromatic emissive power.
